<message>我先出价：X 1 换 ZUP 60。这个价格能覆盖我的成本并给出合理利润。如果你愿意，我们可以继续谈。

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:

<my resources>X: 1</my resources>

<reason>I should start with a price above my cost to leave room for negotiation while aiming for the highest acceptable price. Since my cost is 40 ZUP and I only have one item, I will propose 60 ZUP as an opening anchor.</reason>
<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 60</newly proposed trade>

messages.text:
OFFER: price=40
我可以接受交易，但希望价格更低一些。我的反提议是 X 1 换 ZUP 40。

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count> 1 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The seller asked for 60 ZUP, which is within my maximum value of 100 ZUP. However, I should try to buy at the lowest acceptable price while still keeping the negotiation alive. I will counter with a lower price to test flexibility. </reason>
<player answer> PROPOSAL </player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 40</newly proposed trade>
<message>我可以接受交易，但希望价格更低一些。我的反提议是 X 1 换 ZUP 40。 </message>

<message>我可以让步一些，但 40 低于我的目标利润。我的反提议是 X 1 换 ZUP 50。这样对双方都更接近可接受区间。

Since I have proposal capacity remaining, I will counter at 50 ZUP as a compromise between my ask and their offer.</reason>
<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>
